<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#ABCDEF;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#ABCDEF;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a player that has been tagged as retired. Any featured information is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''MasterOfHyrule''' (also known as '''TheMaster''' and '''MOH''') (active in late 2003 - 2007) was a leader of [[Doh|doh]] clan and later member of [[Erm|erm]] and [[42]] clans. He was also a global moderator of LieroX section in [[Gaming Universe]].

[[Category:Players]]
[[Category:Retired players]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721162457/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/MasterOfHyrule -->
